rationale: The cited paper studies emotional contagion spillovers in persuasive communication (affect-as-information on unrelated evaluations), while the citing paper’s core contribution is an attribute–hedonic decomposition of product-comparison effects with common vs. distinct attributes and category norms. With only a DOI-level match and no in-text citation context, there is plausible conceptual overlap (hedonic/assimilation processes) but insufficient evidence to confidently treat it as either clearly substantive or clearly incidental.
